name: Constellation Energy Corporation
content: Constellation Energy is the largest producer of carbon-free energy in the United States and the leading operator of commercial nuclear power plants. Providing approximately 10% of the nation's clean energy, Constellation is a foundational anchor for the nuclear renaissance. The company maintains a massive fleet of high-uptime nuclear assets and is a preferred partner for technology hyperscalers (such as Microsoft and Meta) seeking reliable, 24/7 carbon-free power through long-term purchase agreements.
